name: Insane Gangster Satan Disciples
description: The Insane Gangster Satan Disciples are a Latino (Mexican) Folk Nation street gang founded in 1960 by 'King Satan' (Ray) in North Lawndale, Chicago near 15th and Talman. Originally formed by 12-year-old boys to defend against Egyptian Cobras and Vice Lords in the racially changing neighborhood. Their baby devil symbol came from old comic books. Adopted both 'Insane' and 'Gangster' concepts making them 'Insane Gangster Satan Disciples.' Part of the ATTSDN alliance with Ambrose, Two Two Boys, and Two Six in the late 70s-80s. Grew to almost 10,000 members with territory across Brighton Park, Heart of Chicago, Marquette Park, West Town, and suburbs. Operate in an organized crime manner prioritizing profitable territory.
